name: Rayfield Caliburn
location: Found free in a tunnel cave near the Aldecaldos camp in the Badlands
description: The fastest car in Night City. A sleek black hypercar with unmatched acceleration and top speed. The pinnacle of Rayfield engineering.
how_to_get: Complete the 'Ghost Town' main job with Panam. Wait 3 in-game days, then find the car in the tunnel near the rocky ridge south of the Aldecaldos camp. The car is in a shipping container.

name: Rayfield Aerondight 'Guinevere'
location: Available for purchase from a fixer after reaching Street Cred 50
description: A luxury hypercar favored by Night City's elite. Combines blistering speed with opulent comfort. Crystal-dome roof and autonomous driving capability.
how_to_get: Reach Street Cred 50. Purchase from the fixer vehicle offer that appears on your phone. The car will be delivered to your garage.

name: Quadra Type-66 Avenger
location: Available for purchase from Dino Dinovic in Watson
description: A powerful American-style muscle car with aggressive styling. The Avenger variant features enhanced engine output and a menacing dark paintjob.
how_to_get: Complete several gigs in Watson and reach sufficient Street Cred. Dino Dinovic will send a vehicle purchase offer via text message.

name: Quadra Type-66 Javelina
location: Available for purchase from Dakota Smith in the Badlands
description: A rugged Badlands variant of the Type-66. Desert-ready with reinforced suspension, roll cage, and sand-colored paintwork. Built to handle the rough terrain outside Night City.
how_to_get: Complete gigs for Dakota Smith in the Badlands. She will offer the vehicle via text message once sufficient Street Cred is reached.

name: Quadra Type-66 Cthulhu
location: Available for purchase from a fixer in Santo Domingo
description: A sinister black variant of the Type-66 with custom modifications. Named after the eldritch horror, it features unique decals and a tuned engine for street racing.
how_to_get: Complete gigs in Santo Domingo and reach the required Street Cred. The purchase offer arrives via text from the local fixer.

name: Quadra Turbo-R V-Tech
location: Available for purchase from a fixer after reaching high Street Cred
description: A high-performance sports car that rivals even Rayfield vehicles. Turbo-charged engine with excellent handling. One of the fastest non-hypercar vehicles available.
how_to_get: Reach high Street Cred (40+). The purchase offer comes from a Westbrook fixer via text message.

name: Thorton Colby CX410 Butte
location: Available for purchase from Regina Jones in Watson
description: A sturdy pickup truck built for work. Reliable and durable but not fast. Good for anyone who wants a no-nonsense ride with plenty of cargo space.
how_to_get: Complete early gigs for Regina Jones. She will offer the vehicle via text at low Street Cred requirements.

name: Thorton Galena G240
location: Available for purchase from fixers in Watson
description: An affordable economy car. Cheap, reliable, and utterly unremarkable. Gets you from point A to B without any flair. Popular among Night City's working class.
how_to_get: One of the cheapest vehicles available. Purchase offer comes early from Watson fixers via text.

name: Thorton Galena 'Rattler'
location: Available for purchase from a fixer in the Badlands
description: A Badlands-modified Galena with off-road capabilities. Raised suspension, desert paint, and reinforced bumpers make it a capable wasteland runner.
how_to_get: Complete gigs for Dakota Smith in the Badlands. Purchase offer sent via text.

name: Thorton Mackinaw MTL1
location: Available for purchase from Dakota Smith in the Badlands
description: A massive heavy-duty truck built for the Badlands. Enormous, tough, and intimidating. Can plow through obstacles and smaller vehicles with ease.
how_to_get: Complete Badlands gigs for Dakota Smith and reach the required Street Cred level. Purchase offer arrives via text.

name: Thorton Mackinaw 'Beast'
location: Available for purchase from the Badlands fixer at high Street Cred
description: The ultimate Badlands beast. A heavily modified Mackinaw with military-grade reinforcement, a custom turbo engine, and intimidating aesthetics. Panam's signature style.
how_to_get: Reach very high Street Cred. The purchase offer comes from Dakota Smith after completing most Badlands gigs.

name: Arch Nazare
location: Available for purchase from fixer in Westbrook
description: A premium custom motorcycle designed by Keanu Reeves' real-world Arch Motorcycle company. Sleek, fast, and a real head-turner on Night City streets.
how_to_get: Reach high Street Cred (40+). The purchase offer arrives from a Westbrook fixer.

name: Arch Nazare 'Itsumade'
location: Available for purchase from Wakako Okada in Westbrook
description: A Tyger Claw themed variant of the Arch Nazare. Features Japanese-inspired custom paintwork and enhanced handling for weaving through city traffic.
how_to_get: Complete gigs for Wakako Okada in Japantown. Purchase offer sent via text at sufficient Street Cred.

name: Porsche 911 II (930)
location: Obtained during 'Chippin' In' main job at the Ebunike docks
description: Johnny Silverhand's classic 1977 Porsche 911 Turbo. A lovingly maintained pre-war classic. The only real-world car in the game. An absolute icon.
how_to_get: During the 'Chippin' In' main job, after defeating Grayson on the Ebunike ship, choose to take the car from the shipping container instead of killing Grayson (or do both).

name: Makigai MaiMai P126
location: Available for purchase from Regina Jones in Watson
description: An absurdly tiny microcar. Looks like a toy. Barely fits V inside. Slow and fragile but surprisingly maneuverable in tight spaces. A cult favorite.
how_to_get: Available early from Regina Jones. One of the cheapest vehicles in the game. Purchase offer via text.

name: Mizutani Shion MZ2
location: Available for purchase from Wakako Okada in Westbrook
description: A sleek Japanese sports car with clean lines and excellent performance. Favored by corpos and Tyger Claws alike. Great balance of speed and handling.
how_to_get: Complete gigs for Wakako Okada in Japantown and reach required Street Cred. Purchase offer arrives via text.

name: Mizutani Shion 'Coyote'
location: Available for purchase from Dakota Smith in the Badlands
description: A Badlands variant of the Shion. Rally-inspired modifications including raised suspension, off-road tires, and dust-resistant intakes. Fast on any terrain.
how_to_get: Complete most Badlands gigs for Dakota Smith. Requires moderately high Street Cred. Purchase offer sent via text.

name: Villefort Alvarado
location: Available for purchase from fixers in Heywood
description: A classic lowrider favored by the Valentinos. Long, heavy, and full of style. Hydraulic suspension and chrome accents. Cruising at its finest.
how_to_get: Complete gigs in Heywood for the local fixer. Purchase offer arrives via text at moderate Street Cred.

name: Villefort Alvarado 'Vato'
location: Available for purchase from Padre in Heywood
description: A customized Alvarado with Valentinos gang flair. Gold trim, custom hydraulics, and a booming sound system. The ultimate lowrider statement.
how_to_get: Complete gigs for Padre in Heywood and reach sufficient Street Cred. Purchase offer sent via text.

name: Villefort Columbus V340-F Freight
location: Available for purchase from fixers in Santo Domingo
description: A large, practical SUV designed for cargo hauling. Not glamorous but extremely functional. Popular with corporate logistics and freelance drivers.
how_to_get: Complete gigs in Santo Domingo and reach required Street Cred. Purchase offer comes via text from the local fixer.

name: Brennan Apollo
location: Available for purchase from fixers across multiple districts
description: A rugged all-terrain motorcycle. Not the fastest but handles well on rough roads and off-road terrain. Popular in the Badlands.
how_to_get: Available from various fixers at low Street Cred requirements. Purchase offer arrives via text.

name: Kusanagi CT-3X
location: Available for purchase from Wakako Okada in Westbrook
description: A futuristic sport motorcycle inspired by the iconic Akira bike. Red paint, elongated body, and blistering speed. One of the fastest bikes in Night City.
how_to_get: Complete gigs for Wakako Okada. One of the best value vehicles in the game. Purchase offer via text.

name: Chevillon Thrax 388 Jefferson
location: Available for purchase from fixers in City Center
description: A luxury SUV favored by corporate executives and politicians. Armored plating, tinted windows, and a powerful engine. The definition of corpo transport.
how_to_get: Complete gigs in City Center. Purchase offer arrives from the local fixer via text at moderate Street Cred.

name: Chevillon Emperor 620 Ragnar
location: Available for purchase from fixers in Pacifica
description: A heavily armored luxury SUV. The preferred vehicle of high-ranking Militech officials and wealthy paranoids. Extremely durable with excellent road presence.
how_to_get: Complete gigs in Pacifica and reach required Street Cred. Purchase offer from Mr. Hands via text.

name: Mahir Supron FS3
location: Available for purchase from fixers in Watson
description: A boxy, utilitarian van. Slow and ungainly but spacious. Popular as delivery vehicles and mobile homes for Night City's less fortunate residents.
how_to_get: Available from Watson fixers at very low Street Cred. Purchase offer arrives via text early in the game.

name: Quadra Type-66 'Jen Rowley'
location: Available for purchase from El Capitan in Santo Domingo
description: A flashy neon-colored variant of the Type-66. Named after a famous Night City street racer. Eye-catching paint scheme with performance modifications.
how_to_get: Complete gigs for El Capitan in Santo Domingo. Purchase offer arrives via text at moderate Street Cred.

name: Villefort Cortes V5000 Valor
location: Available for purchase from fixers in Heywood
description: A mid-range SUV suitable for city driving. Decent speed, good durability, and enough style to not embarrass you. A practical everyday choice.
how_to_get: Complete gigs in Heywood. Purchase offer from Padre via text at moderate Street Cred.

name: Thorton Colby C125
location: Available for purchase from Regina Jones in Watson
description: A compact hatchback that's a step up from the Galena. Slightly better performance and looks. Still budget-friendly and unpretentious.
how_to_get: Available from Regina Jones at low Street Cred. Purchase offer via text.

name: Rayfield Caliburn (Black)
location: Available for purchase from fixer at very high Street Cred
description: The purchasable variant of the Caliburn in a stunning black finish. Same blistering performance as the free variant. A status symbol of the highest order.
how_to_get: Reach Street Cred 40+. The purchase offer arrives from a City Center fixer via text. If you already found the free one, this offers an alternate color.

name: Mizutani Shion 'Nekomata'
location: Available for purchase from Wakako Okada in Westbrook
description: A special edition Shion with Arasaka-inspired design. Matte black with red accents. Enhanced engine and suspension tuning for superior handling.
how_to_get: Complete advanced gigs for Wakako Okada. Requires high Street Cred. Purchase offer via text.

name: Quadra Turbo-R 740
location: Available for purchase from El Capitan in Santo Domingo
description: A more affordable variant of the Turbo-R line. Still fast and aggressive but slightly less tuned than the V-Tech. Great value for a sports car.
how_to_get: Complete gigs for El Capitan in Santo Domingo. Purchase offer arrives via text at moderate Street Cred.

name: Jackie's Arch
location: Obtained after visiting Jackie's garage during 'Heroes' side job
description: Jackie Welles' custom motorcycle. A modified Arch with personal touches and sentimental value. Given to V as a memento of their fallen partner.
how_to_get: Complete the 'Heroes' side job where V attends Jackie's funeral/ofrenda. Afterwards, visit the Welles family garage in Heywood to claim the bike.

name: Delamain No. 21
location: Reward from Delamain questline
description: One of Delamain's rogue taxi cabs with a unique AI personality. Has autonomous driving capability and distinctive Delamain corporate livery.
how_to_get: Complete all 'Epistrophy' side jobs finding Delamain's rogue cabs, then complete the final 'Don't Lose Your Mind' mission. Vehicle reward depends on choices made.
